import io
import string

fn toggle_case(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte >= 65 and byte <= 90
        byte + 32
      else if byte >= 97 and byte <= 122
        byte - 32
      else
        byte
      end
    when None
      0
    end
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  println(toggle_case(line))
end
